title: noccaea × gremliana
intro: Noccaea × gremliana, also known as Gremli's rockcress or a hybrid of the Noccaea genus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea × gremliana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-rheumatic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in salves and poultices for topical application.
